mapper.insert: /* 일괄 피드백 등록 ForumFdbkDAO.insertForumAllFdbk */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK ( DSCS_FDBK_ID , DSCS_ID , STD_ID , TEAM_ID , FDBK_CTS , DELYN , RGTRNM , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT FN_NEW_ID('FDBK') , DSCS_ID , STD_ID , TEAM_ID , #{fdbkCts} , 'N' , #{regNm} , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
mapper.select: /* 피드백 조회 ForumFdbkDAO.selectFdbk */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(DSCS_FDBK_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT , DSCS_FDBK_ID , PAR_FORUM_FDBK_CD , DSCS_ID , STD_ID , TEAM_ID , FDBK_CTS , DELYN , RGTRNM , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC
